programmes.show_description: Catch up on another afternoon of fun and crafting on Hobbymaker! Some items may have sold out since original broadcast.

...Fabrics: Discover a wide range of beautiful fabrics at reduced prices, perfect for refreshing your wardrobe projects while stocks last.
...Fabrics: Add a pop of colour and personality to your projects! Shop a vibrant selection of prints at fantastic reduced prices.
Stock up on quilting favourites for less in this hour! From charm packs to fat quarters, enjoy fantastic savings on ready-to-use fabric bundles.
...Fabrics: Perfect for backings, home décor, and more, these generously sized fabrics come at fantastic reduced prices while stocks last.
Featuring eye-catching designs ready to sew, these panels offer fantastic value and instant inspiration while stocks last.
Join Toni for must-have papercrafting items, designed to spark your imagination and transform your projects. Who doesn't love a craft steal? At these prices you're in for a treat!

...Fabric: Discover the vibrant new Kaffe Fassett Collective fabrics, full of bold colours and striking patterns. Perfect for quilting, patchwork, and creative sewing projects.
Join us with Allison Maryon for this beautiful Twisted Stripes Quilt - perfect for the upcoming sunny days!
Discover the essential tools every maker needs!
For Allison Maryon's second hour, we have the Happy Families Apron with panel pocket additions to customise the apron.
Discover beautifully curated kits with perfectly coordinated fabrics and patterns, making it easy to create stunning quilts from start to finish.
